title: theandulino's Money Mod
description: theandulino's Money Mod adds a currency system to Minecraft, featuring coins and banknotes for trading and economy-based gameplay.
body: **theandulino's** Money Mod introduces a functional currency system to Minecraft, allowing players to earn, trade, and manage in-game money. The mod features coins and banknotes that can be used for transactions, creating a player-driven economy. Ideal for multiplayer servers and single-player worlds, it enhances trading mechanics and enables a structured financial system within the game.
